support_short: Quick help for common request and tracking issues
support_sheet_description:
If you face a problem during ordering or shipment tracking:
1) Make sure you selected the correct address.
2) Make sure your contact number is correct.
3) Review the request status from "My Requests".
4) If tracking does not appear, wait until the worker starts the shipping stage.
my_requests_subtitle: You can now open the first request with new offers or jump directly to the highest-value offer.

worker_support_description:
If you face an issue, first make sure:
1) You update your current location from this screen.
2) You add the vehicle from the My Vehicles tab.
3) Internet and location permission are available.
4) You wait for management review of the added vehicles.
